cli.arg.name: Project name (kebab-case). No 'jw-' prefix.
cli.opt.jw_core: jw-core version range for the generated pyproject.toml.
cli.opt.check_pypi: Verify the name is not taken on PyPI (requires network).
validate.pypi_taken: Name {name!r} is already taken on PyPI.
render.target_exists: Output directory {path} already exists. Use a fresh path.
next_steps.line4: Then edit src/{module}/ to implement your plugin.
tagline: 100% for Jehovah's Witnesses publications. Scope is jw-agent-toolkit.
